changeRequests.instruction: Import the "stripe" design system from awesome-design-md. Run the ds-import workflow with source "awesome/stripe" and name "stripe". After import, run ds-generate-preview for the rich preview HTML.
Import the "stripe" design system from awesome-design-md. Run the ds-import workflow with source "awesome/stripe" and name "stripe". After import, run ds-generate-preview for the rich preview HTML.
